# Hernandez Law Office — Salem, OR
> Hernandez Law Office — bilingual immigration attorney in Salem, Oregon. Green cards, citizenship, work permits, family petitions and deportation defense. Free, confidential consultation. 3850 Portland Rd NE, Ste 200. Call (503) 746-9277. A Portland Road office with a bilingual team for urgent ICE and detention matters.

## Services
- Family & Green Cards
- Citizenship & Naturalization
- Work Permits & Visas
- Removal / Deportation Defense
- Asylum & Humanitarian
- DACA & Renewals

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97301)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 746-9277 · Hours: Mon–Fri 9am–5pm · Languages: English, Español
